allow: Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\([\(a['id'],a['status']\) for a in d['artifacts']]\)")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(json.dumps\([\(a['id'],a['status']\) for a in d['artifacts']], indent=2\)\)")
